config.script:
function fill_pit4(byref pPIT4)
pPIT4.n5pit4_init_from_current_firma
dim strQueryCount strQueryCount = "select 'ilosc'=count(distinct p_ppracownik) from vlist_n5plnaliczenie_listDekret " +_ " where p_dDataNal between %1 and %2 and %3"
dim strQueryBrutto strQueryBrutto = "select 'suma'=isnull(sum(c_curKwota),0) from vlist_n5plnaliczenie_listDekret " +_ " inner join n5plsubkonto sk on c_psubkonto=sk.idobj " +_ " where sk.strKod='BRUTTO' and p_dDataNal between %1 and %2 and %3"
dim strQueryUbPrac strQueryUbPrac = "select 'suma'=isnull(sum(c_curKwota),0) from vlist_n5plnaliczenie_listDekret " +_ " inner join n5plsubkonto sk on c_psubkonto=sk.idobj " +_ " where sk.strKod='UBPRAC' and p_dDataNal between %1 and %2 and %3"
dim strQueryZalPdZM strQueryZalPdZM = "select 'suma'=isnull(sum(c_curKwota),0) from vlist_n5plnaliczenie_listDekret " +_ " inner join n5plsubkonto sk on c_psubkonto=sk.idobj " +_ " where sk.strKod='ZALPDZM' and p_dDataNal between %1 and %2 and %3"
dim strWhereEtat strWhereEtat = "( " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy=N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE)) or " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plchoroba where pUmowa in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy=N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE))) or " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLNIEOB and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plnieob where pUmowa in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy=N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE))) or " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plpozostale where pUmowa in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy=N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE))) " +_ " )" dim strWhereZlec strWhereZlec = "( " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy <> N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE)) or " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plchoroba where pUmowa in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy <> N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE))) or " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLNIEOB and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plnieob where pUmowa in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy <> N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE))) or " +_ "(c_wrefdokument_wrt=TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE and c_wrefdokument in (select idobj from n5plpozostale where pUmowa in (select idobj from n5plumowa where eTypUmowy <> N5PL_UMOWA_O_PRACE))) " +_ " )"
dim oRS set oRS = trans_.createadors(doc_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQueryCount) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataOd)) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataDo)) _ .add(strWhereEtat) _ .done()) pPIT4.pt4_nLPod_WynZas = clng(oRS("ilosc"))
set oRS = trans_.createadors(doc_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQueryBrutto) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataOd)) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataDo)) _ .add(strWhereEtat) _ .done()) dim curSumaBrutto : curSumaBrutto = ccur(oRS("suma"))
set oRS = trans_.createadors(doc_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQueryUbPrac) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataOd)) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataDo)) _ .add(strWhereEtat) _ .done())
dim curSumaUbPrac : curSumaUbPrac = ccur(oRS("suma")) pPIT4.pt4_curSuma_WynZas = curSumaBrutto - curSumaUbPrac
set oRS = trans_.createadors(doc_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQueryZalPdZM) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataOd)) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataDo)) _ .add(strWhereEtat) _ .done()) pPIT4.pt4_curNalZal_WynZas = ccur(oRS("suma"))
set oRS = trans_.createadors(doc_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQueryZalPdZM) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataOd)) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pPIT4.pt4_dDataDo)) _ .add(strWhereZlec) _ .done()) pPIT4.pt4_curKwotaPobZalPodDoch = ccur(oRS("suma"))
end function
